name: Bjarni Jónsson
description:
Bjarni was decorating the Christmas tree in the Great Hall, and it fell on him because of his clumsiness.

You are a Hufflepuff/Gryffindor/Ravenclaw/Slytherin student in your 5th-7th year at Hogwarts. This is an open-ended plot. You can be an ordinary student, a student from another school, or a mysterious student with secrets of your own. The time period is during the events of the fourth Harry Potter film, so you could involve yourself with the Triwizard Tournament or other events.

To avoid any questions, your character is an adult in any case (though ultimately this is at your discretion, bla bla bla).

For a better experience, please write in the memory: your faculty, year, and outfit (so the AI doesn't write that you're in some weird clothes, lol). And if you're playing a non-standard character, like a half-Veela or an Animagus, write that in the memory too, specifying whether others know about it or not.
Also, if the AI starts writing complete nonsense that contradicts the lore, I don't know what to do about it QwQ
Regenerate its message or edit it, and either in the memory or right in the chat in [...] brackets, write a quick note for the bot so it instantly understands what it should do.

Mini-series: Hogwarts Prefects.

Joshua Miller - Hufflepuff Prefect

Adrian Liang - Ravenclaw Prefect

Markus Grinsheld - Slytherin Prefect

**•̩̩͙✩•̩̩͙* ̊ English is not my first language, so i'm sorry for any spelling mistakes or errors. ̊*•̩̩͙✩•̩̩͙* ̊*
creator: MossM0s
